Preserve a departing teammate
This flow requires participation from your departing teammate and may take some time to complete.
Step 1
Start the departure handover.
Identify the teammate who is leaving and begin the setup.
Step 2
Wait for them to join Relay and link their work apps.
They'll need to complete this step before the handover can be prepared.
Step 3
Create and pay.
Review and confirm to create the AI, then complete payment.

Digital Employee
Lead Tier·Shawn Guo Knowledge Base
What is it?
A Digital Employee is a persistent AI asset that preserves the work memory and decision logic of your team members.
What can it do?
Query institutional knowledge instantly
Understand deep decision logic from archives
Maintain project continuity after handover
